assertion_results.text: Query includes metadata.event_type = "NETWORK_CONNECTION" or similar filter
assertion_results.evidence: Wrote SQL: FROM network_connections WHERE event_type = 'connection' — not UDM YARA-L syntax

assertion_results.text: Query uses match: section with a $ip or similar variable
assertion_results.evidence: No match: section — uses SQL GROUP BY source_ip

assertion_results.text: Query uses outcome: section with count(), sum(), and avg() functions
assertion_results.evidence: No outcome: section — uses SQL SELECT COUNT(*), SUM, AVG

assertion_results.text: Query uses order: section with desc
assertion_results.evidence: ORDER BY event_count DESC present (SQL syntax)

assertion_results.text: Query does NOT use pipe syntax
assertion_results.evidence: Entire response is SQL — fundamentally wrong query language for SecOps SIEM
No $var assignment — uses SQL column aliases

assertion_results.text: Query does not use AND keyword between conditions
assertion_results.evidence: Uses SQL WHERE clause with AND between conditions
